title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Marina Greg expresses intense fear and paranoia to her husband, Jason Rad, following the deaths of Ella and Giuseppe. She believes an unknown enemy is targeting her, citing a suspicious incident at a movie company where she suspects her coffee was poisoned. Marina expresses suspicion toward Ella, believing Ella hated her due to her love for Jason, but she acknowledges Ella is dead. Jason attempts to comfort Marina, promising to ensure her safety, though Marina notes his expression becomes strange, like a "clown laughing at something extremely sad," when he swears to care for her until the end. To calm herself, Marina requests a yellow pill.

The following day, Chief Inspector Craiglockhart visits Miss Marple, feeling disheartened by two murders occurring within twenty-four hours. Miss Marple provides him with whisky and soda to help him relax. During their conversation, DeMortimer Craddock (referred to as Dermot) and Miss Marple discuss the investigation. Miss Marple suggests that the murderer is often the most obvious person, such as a spouse. While Dermot argues that Jason Rad is truly in love with Marina, Miss Marple notes that while Jason is a wealthy man with no obvious motive to kill his wife, investigators must look "around the edges" of the case. She concludes that while the investigation might naturally focus on the husband, the true culprit remains difficult to find.
